---
title: "Disentangling spatial interference and spatial confounding biases in causal inference"
subtitle: "arXiv preprint arXiv:2602.02777 (2026)"
date: 2026-02-01
authors:
  - Ifedayo Ogunsola
  - Olatunji Johnson
categories: ["Preprint"]
---

**Links:** [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.02777)

**Summary.** Develops methods to separately identify and correct for spatial interference (treatment effects spilling over to neighbours) and spatial confounding (unmeasured spatially structured covariates) in causal inference with geo-referenced data, settings where these two biases commonly co-occur.
